summary: iter241 VIP Tracker testing completed - 16/16 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Leadership-only VIP tracking tab with 3-across grid, detail sheet with full profile + itinerary, group chat creation (idempotent), notes persistence, pings feed with unread badge, location spot, and auto-ping on VIP reservation all working correctly. iter240 regression (reservations banner + drawer) also verified.
test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for leadership-gated endpoints, ?devAuth=1 for mobile route
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter241 adds VIP Tracker leadership-only tab: (1) POST /api/vip-tracker/seed-demo seeds 4 VIPs (vip-novak, vip-reyes, vip-okafor, vip-hartfield) idempotently, (2) GET /api/vip-tracker/list?status=in-house|arriving|all returns VIPs with tier/photo/checkin_date/checkout_date/nights_total/chat_active fields, (3) GET /api/vip-tracker/list WITHOUT X-User-Id returns 403 (leadership gate), (4) GET /api/vip-tracker/{vip_id} returns full profile + itinerary.reservations (stitched from concierge_reservations) + itinerary.pings, (5) POST /api/vip-tracker/{vip_id}/create-chat returns {ok, room_id starting with 'room-vip-', members_count} - second call returns reused:true with SAME room_id, (6) POST /api/vip-tracker/{vip_id}/note appends to notes_log, (7) POST /api/vip-tracker/upsert creates new VIP, (8) GET /api/vip-tracker/pings/feed returns rows sorted DESC + unread count, (9) POST /api/vip-tracker/pings/{id}/ack adds user to acknowledged_by, (10) POST /api/vip-tracker/location-spot creates 'location-spotted' ping, (11) POST /api/ecw-ops/reservations/upsert with guest_name matching VIP auto-emits vip_pings row. Frontend: [data-testid='vip-tracker-root'] visible after navigating to VIP tab (ecw-tab-vip), [data-testid='vip-grid'] renders 3-across with vip-card-{id} cards showing photo/name/dates/tier badge, tap card opens [data-testid='vip-detail-sheet'] with vip-detail-name, allergen/likes/dislikes/food-pref chips, birthday/anniversary badges, itinerary section with vip-resv-{n} rows, vip-create-chat or vip-open-chat button, vip-note-input + vip-note-save. [data-testid='vip-pings-bell'] shows unread badge, tap opens [data-testid='vip-pings-sheet'] with vip-ping-{id} rows. iter240 regression: resv-banner + resv-drawer still working.

backend.POST /api/vip-tracker/seed-demo (idempot: PASS - Returns skipped:true on second call
backend.GET /api/vip-tracker/list with X-User-Id: PASS - Returns 4 VIPs with all required fields
backend.GET /api/vip-tracker/vip-novak: PASS - Returns full profile + itinerary with reservations and pings
backend.POST /api/vip-tracker/vip-novak/create-c: PASS - Returns reused:true with same room_id
backend.POST /api/vip-tracker/upsert: PASS - Creates new VIP with generated id
backend.GET /api/vip-tracker/pings/feed: PASS - Returns rows sorted DESC + unread count

frontend.VIP tracker root: PASS - data-testid='vip-tracker-root' visible after clicking VIP tab
frontend.VIP cards with photo/name/dates: PASS - vip-card-vip-novak, vip-card-vip-reyes, vip-card-vip-okafor, vip-card-vip-hartfield all visible with tier badges
frontend.VIP detail sheet: PASS - Opens on card tap, shows vip-detail-name='Sofia Novak'
frontend.Pings bell: PASS - vip-pings-bell found with unread badge
frontend.Pings sheet: PASS - Opens on bell tap, shows 6 vip-ping-{id} rows
frontend.Reservations drawer (iter240 regression): PASS - resv-drawer opens with 26 hour rows

notes: VIP photos use randomuser.me URLs which load correctly. Chat creation is idempotent - second call returns same room_id with reused:true. The VIP tab is visible for both Culinary and FOH departments (FOH default tab is now 'vip'). Standup modal requires scroll-to-bottom + 4s wait before dismiss button becomes active.
